tasks.subject: Task 1: Core station_outlier_counts + config_from_flags
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-station outlier aggregation (reusing existing checks) + flags->config helper, no filter_outliers behavior change.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/outliers.py, src/smoke_sense/bin/_outlier_cli.py, tests/test_outliers.py, tests/test_outlier_cli.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/outliers.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/_outlier_cli.py", "tests/test_outliers.py", "tests/test_outlier_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_outliers.py tests/test_outlier_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["station_outlier_counts fraction/sort/flagged>0/empty", "filter_outliers unchanged", "config_from_flags maps flags + bad bound raises"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: outliers CLI command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the smoke-sense outliers command and register it.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/outliers.py, src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py, tests/test_outliers_command.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/outliers.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py", "tests/test_outliers_command.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["table + json shape", "--limit + --exclude-station pre-drop", "bad bound nonzero + multi-fips + no-data message"]}
```
